# Project Template

## Purpose

Use this template to describe a project that is entering or moving
through OSL.

## Scope

Keep the summary short and evidence-based. The template should help
reviewers understand the project without asking for basic context.

## Fields

### Name

Project name as it appears in the repository and issue tracker.

### Repository

Canonical repository URL.

### License

License name and link if needed.

### Stage

Target stage or current stage, depending on where the project is in the
workflow.

### Summary

A short description of what the project does and who it is for.

### Maintainers

Names or handles for the people responsible for the project.

### Current status

What is working today, what is incomplete, and what needs review.

### Next goals

The smallest set of next steps needed for the next stage or release.
